##  Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

##  Problem It Solves
Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it.
(e.g. *I'm always frustrated when Nexora does X...*)

##  Proposed Solution
Describe what you want to happen and how it could work.

##  Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already tried.

##  Affected Area
- [ ] Model Registry
- [ ] Predictive Analytics Engine
- [ ] Dashboard / Frontend
- [ ] API / Backend
- [ ] AI Assistant (Ollama)
- [ ] Other

##  Additional Context
Any screenshots, mockups, or extra context here.
